evidence: Responsible AI, as it's called, is an initiative out of the Oakland-based university's Block Center for Technology and Society with support from faculty in the School of Computer Science and members of the Dean's Office staff.

source.name: Responsible AI Initiative
source.notes_excerpt: Multiple organizations operate under the name "Responsible AI Initiative" with different scopes and affiliations. The University of Utah operates the One-U Responsible AI Initiative, which aims to advance AI to achieve societal good while protecting privacy, civil rights, and civil liberties. target.name: Block Center for Technology and Society
target.notes_excerpt: The Block Center for Technology and Society at Carnegie Mellon University was established in 2019 to study how emerging technologies alter the future of work, how AI and analytics can be harnessed for social good, and how innovation can reduce inequality. target.name: Emily Bender
target.notes_excerpt: Co-authored the influential 2021 'Stochastic Parrots' paper warning of LLM risks, which contributed to Google firing co-authors Timnit Gebru and Margaret Mitchell.
